title: PROS and CONS of The University of Maryland, College Park (UMD) **MUST WATCH BEFORE COMING TO UMD**
body: CONGRATS TO EVERYONE WHO GOT INTO UMD 🥳🥳🥳🥳!!! I know you guys may have questions about UMD, therefore, I am planning on filming a Q&A video! If you have any specific questions about the school please reply to this comment so I can answer your questions in the Q& A video!
author: @AccordingtoAma

title: PROS and CONS of The University of Maryland, College Park (UMD) **MUST WATCH BEFORE COMING TO UMD**
body: Bruhhhh!!!! The construction is wild!!!! DOTS is cool though however, I come early and leave late so I'm not moving around as much with my car.
author: @justgetitDLC

title: PROS and CONS of The University of Maryland, College Park (UMD) **MUST WATCH BEFORE COMING TO UMD**
body: Adding on to this -- DOTS will sometimes ticket you, even if you have a parking permit, and permits are hecking expensive. And sometimes for games, depending on the lot you're in, you still gotta move your car by a certain time or else you get fined. I had to pay DOTS $85 for being an hour late in moving my car for a parking spot that I paid nearly $900 for (it was for the full year, but still :( )
author: @hi.mynameisry
